applicantHhortSynopsisMaximum600Characte: A retired intelligence officer is pulled back into action when a rogue operative threatens to destabilize the Caribbean. Filming across Kingston and Montego Bay, the production features high-octane chase sequences through downtown Kingston, scenic helicopter shots over the Blue Mountains, and dramatic confrontations at Port Royal. The story celebrates Jamaica's culture while delivering world-class action cinema.
applicantProposedProductionLocations:
1. Downtown Kingston — New Kingston business district (chase sequences, office interiors)
2. Port Royal — Historic fort and waterfront (climactic confrontation scenes)
3. Blue Mountains — John Crow Peak trail area (helicopter aerial shots, mountain hideout scenes)
4. Montego Bay — Hip Strip and Doctor's Cave Beach (resort scenes, undercover meetings)
5. Trelawny — Cockpit Country (jungle pursuit sequences)
6. Kingston Harbour — Industrial waterfront (night action sequences)
applicantAdress: 4200 Wilshire Boulevard, Suite 1100, Los Angeles, CA 90010, United States
